perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a title card featuring white text on a black background. It cuts to a man wearing a beige flat cap, glasses, and a white sweatshirt standing at a bike-sharing station. He gestures toward the handlebars and basket of a yellow bicycle. (2) He points his index finger at an instructional sticker inside the bicycle's front basket, highlighting contact information. (3) A close-up shows him looking surprised and disappointed as digital blue tear graphics are added to his face. (4) He holds a smartphone (iPhone) to the camera, demonstrating how to use the 'YouBike 2.0' app. He taps through menus titled 'No space to return' and 'Request extra time'. (5) He stands in front of a row of bicycles and a city street with traffic, explaining the procedure while gesturing with his hands and holding the phone.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo electronic background music begins. A male voice speaks in an energetic and instructional tone. (2) Sounds of city traffic and wind noise are audible under the vocals. (3) A cartoonish 'boing' sound effect plays during a visual transition. (4) The speaker continues his explanation with a steady, friendly tone. The music maintains a constant rhythm and volume throughout the app demonstration. (5) The audio concludes with a final summary statement from the speaker as the music fades out.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '網路傳說' (Internet Legend) in large white characters. (2) Decorative Text: 'YouBike 站滿了!' (YouBike station is full!) appearing with emotional stickers. (3) Functional Text: Chronological subtitles throughout the video translating the spoken dialogue. (4) Technical Text: 'YouBike App', '無位可還' (No space to return), and '申請滿站增時' (Apply for extra time) shown on the smartphone screen.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Problem Hook -> First Solution (Manual/Phone) -> Emotional Reaction -> Second Solution (App Demo) -> Final Advice

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator presenting to the camera; blurry figures of pedestrians are visible in the distant background but are not distinct characters.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: An adult male wearing a beige and brown checkered flat cap, glasses, a white sweatshirt with red cursive text ('Banff'), and a dark beaded bracelet on his right wrist.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A typical urban street in Taiwan featuring a YouBike 2.0 docking station with numerous yellow bicycles, green trees, passing cars (including yellow taxis), and modern city buildings.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Problem -> Solution Option A -> Solution Option B -> Conclusion
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To provide a practical tutorial for YouBike users in Taiwan, specifically addressing the common issue of arriving at a full station with no empty docks. The content aims to educate viewers on two methods: calling customer service using info found on the bike, and using the 'No space to return' feature in the mobile app to gain an extra 15 minutes of free time.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video appears to be a public service tip or life hack vlog rather than a paid advertisement for the bicycle service.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-energy delivery, consistent use of a flat cap as a personal brand element, and focus on tech-related life hacks.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video effectively uses short-form vertical video conventions, such as quick cuts and text overlays, to deliver utilitarian information quickly to an urban audience.
